description: Extracts a relationship graph of items in a workspace. Three layers: properties (fast), --deep (definition scanning), --include-connections (API connections). Outputs nodes, edges, and summary.
notes: The graph file contains: {"nodes":[{"id","type","name","workspaceId",...}], "edges":[{"source","target","relationship",...}], "workspaces":[...], "summary":{...}}. Use --no-properties for fast inventory (nodes only, no edges). Use --merge to incrementally build graphs across workspaces. Use --format jsonld for RDF-compatible output.
